items.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (JPM): A Bull Case Theory
items.description: We came across a bullish thesis on JPMorgan Chase & Co. on r/valueinvesting by aexbets249. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on JPM. JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s share was trading at $309.26 as of January 15th. JPM’s trailing and forward P/E were 15.45 and 14.51 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. JPMorgan Chase & Co. (JPM) recently traded […]

items.title: Bank earnings prove there's another leg in this credit cycle
items.description: S&P Global Market Intelligence director of financial institutions research Nathan Stovall elaborates on how he envisions earnings growth for the banking sector in 2026 and what President Trump's proposed 10% rate cap on credit cards could mean for these earnings forecasts. Also watch Nathan Stovall comment on why bank stocks may be slipping despite generally positive earnings results. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

items.title: No fear of 'cockroaches'? Private credit funds raise billions as investors look past warnings
items.description: Investor appetite for private credit remains undeterred even as warnings mount over looser documentation and rising pockets of borrower stress.

items.title: J.P. Morgan Turns Bullish on AutoNation
items.description: Brand strategy seen driving long-term gains

items.title: JPM26: Atea Pharmaceuticals outlines HCV strategy centred on short-duration regimens
items.description: Atea showcased its Phase III HCV programme at JPM for bemnifosbuvir/ruzasvir, positioning the regimen for test-and-treat adoption in ~1,800 patients. C-BEYOND data are expected mid-2026, with C-FORWARD results by year-end 2026.
